title: A threshold
abstract: A universal standalone pre-manufactured threshold unit (11) for a threshold comprising a body (12) for extending across a threshold, the body (12) having a housing (15) for holding insulating material (26) and a mounting base (14) for mounting the threshold unit (11) at a threshold in which the unitary threshold unit (11) is manufactured off-site and can be installed by a single operative at a threshold during construction thus ensuring continuity of perimeter insulation, increased thermal efficiency and improved installation efficiency.
claims: Claims Claims 1. A threshold unit comprising: a body for extending across a threshold, the body having a housing for holding insulating material and a mounting base for mounting the threshold unit at a threshold. 2. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 1 wherein the body comprises an elongate body. 3. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 1 wherein the housing comprises an insulation chamber for receiving insulating material. 4. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 3 wherein the mounting base comprises a base plate to close the insulation chamber. 5. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 3 wherein the housing comprises an insulation chamber opening. 6. A threshold unit as claimed in any of Claims 1 to 5 wherein the mounting base comprises at least one flange for attaching the mounting base to blockwork/substructure. 7. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 6 wherein the housing comprises a front wall, a rear wall opposite the front wall and a top wall extending between the front and rear walls and the at least one flange extends forwardly from the front wall. 8. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 7 wherein the housing further comprise a rear flange extending rearwardly from the rear wall. 9. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 7 or Claim 8 wherein the at least one flange comprises an alignment mechanism to align the threshold unit on blockwork. 10. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 9 wherein the alignment mechanism comprises alignment clips attachable to the at least one flange 11. A threshold unit as claimed in any of Claims 8 to 10 wherein the rear flange comprises a masonry mounting for attaching the threshold unit to blockwork. 12. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 11 wherein the masonry mounting comprises masonry fixings insertable through the rear flange. 13. A threshold unit as claimed in any of Claims 7 to 12 wherein the top wall comprises at least one capillary groove for moisture exclusion. 14. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 13 wherein the top wall comprises a pair of parallel capillary grooves. 15. A threshold unit as claimed in any of Claims 7 to 4 wherein the housing comprises a detachable top plate mountable on the top wall to adjust the size of the threshold unit. 16. A threshold unit as claimed in any of Claims 1 to 15 wherein the housing further comprises a reinforcing plate for reinforcing the threshold unit. 17. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 16 wherein the reinforcing plate comprises a metal reinforcing plate. 18. A threshold unit as claimed in any of Claims 1 to 17 wherein the housing comprises a screeding guide to define a screeding edge for finished floor levels. 19. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 18 wherein the screeding guide comprises a lip on the housing. 20. A threshold unit as claimed in any of Claims 1 to 19 wherein the threshold unit comprises at least one grip for gripping a DPM/radon membrane. 21. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 20 wherein the at least one grip is on the housing and/or the mounting base. 22. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 20 or Claim 21 wherein the at least one grip comprises an adhesive grip. 23. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 20 or Claim 21 wherein the at least one grip comprises a mechanical grip. 24. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 23 wherein the mechanical grip comprises a flap. 25. A threshold unit as claimed in any of Claims 1 to 24 wherein the threshold unit further comprises an integral drainage channel. 26. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 25 wherein the drainage channel is defined in the housing. 27. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 26 wherein the drainage channel is a U- shaped drainage channel. 28. A threshold unit as claimed in Claim 27 wherein the drainage channel comprises a removable grille. 29. A threshold unit as claimed in any of Claims 25 to 28 wherein the drainage channel comprises an outlet. 30. A method for constructing a threshold detail comprising installing a threshold unit as claimed in any of Claims 1 to 29 at a threshold.
